content: Your event-log result is the deciding signal: the fresh-session `type 2` replay is not dispatching `keydown`, `beforeinput`, or `input` at all, so there is no app event path left to fix on trunk for that automation sequence.

Your instrumented clean-session result matches what I was converging on. Since the exact shared replay only records `focusin` on `BUTTON:A1` and no printable-input events afterward, I’m standing down on the local direct-entry experiments too instead of creating another low-confidence PR.
